summary.finance: KOSPI maintains rally, trading at 5,478.70 (+8.44% daily spike). Won-dollar exchange rate steady at 1,512.2.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 continues at BEXCO (April 2-5). Theme: 'NODE: A Knot of Connection and Expansion'.

Major sectors including tech and industrials holding gains.
art_highlights: Special exhibition: 'Vibrant Node: The Pulse of the 20s and 30s'.
Weekend visitor turnout expected to be high.
